behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Devon's interactions and behaviors: a short 'U8P_DEVON::look' description, a large branching conversation ('U8P_DEVON::use'), behavior scheduling, fast-area entry/exit handling, reactions to theft, and reactions to being targeted by spells/effects.

U8P_DEVON::look: returns a short identifying bark when the player examines Devon. It prefers a personal name ('Devon') if devonName is set, otherwise a job title ('fisherman') if devonJob is set, otherwise a generic 'man'.

U8P_DEVON::use: the main dialogue process — builds and mutates menu options, inserts the player's name into lines, captures menu choices, sets conversation/quest flags, and branches heavily based on many Devon/plot flags (quest gating and prior interactions).

U8P_DEVON::schedule: computes Devon's daily U8P_DEVON::schedule/activity parameters from time-of-day and special-state flags (devonInRule, devonJailed) and then calls an engine method to apply the U8P_DEVON::schedule.

U8P_DEVON::enterFastArea / U8P_DEVON::leaveFastArea: fast-area triggers used to start an immediate NPC activity on area entry (unless blocked by global restart/kill guards) and to clear transient references on exit.

U8P_DEVON::AvatarStoleSomething: handles theft near Devon — short-circuits on a particular map, clears transient refs, runs the generic reaction helper, barks at the player, and calls a Devon-specific follow-up routine.

U8P_DEVON::cast: handles being hit/assaulted by special U8P_DEVON::cast types (param1 selector). For the main selector it freezes the Avatar, clears combat, performs timed reaction/animation steps and may notify guards if appropriate.

U8P_DEVON::func5079: a utility that spawns temporary visual/effect items, plays SFX, animates frames, launches a LightningBolt process and applies an Item::receiveHit-style effect; used by U8P_DEVON::cast to create a positional effect.
notable_control_flow: U8P_DEVON::look: simple conditional chain selecting one of three short barks based on devonName/devonJob flags (straight-line control).

U8P_DEVON::use: large menu-driven conversation with many MenuAdd/MenuRemove/MenuUnion/MenuSet operations, Ask + SuspendAssign to capture choices, strcmp-style branching on the captured menu choice, and many SetFlag writes to record outcomes.

U8P_DEVON::schedule: guarded by global restart/kill-like flags (toranDead, secondexecution); prioritizes devonInRule and devonJailed branches, otherwise branches on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod() to select U8P_DEVON::schedule constants, then calls METHOD::func133F to apply the U8P_DEVON::schedule.
U8P_DEVON::enterFastArea: checks global blockers, then launches a separate Npc::cSetActivity process (spawned process + suspend) to begin an immediate activity when the player enters the fast-area.

U8P_DEVON::AvatarStoleSomething / U8P_DEVON::cast: react-to-event sequences that clear transient refs via FREE::resetRef, call a shared reaction helper (METHOD::func091C), emit barks, U8P_DEVON::use suspend/wait helpers (METHOD::func15E7), and optionally call CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime to summon guards.
open_questions: Exact names and semantics of flags written by the dialogue (U8P_DEVON::use) path are not fully enumerated by the disassembly; which specific plot flags are set and how they gate other NPCs is uncertain.
U8P_DEVON::func0261 is referenced as a Devon follow-up for theft but its implementation/side effects are not present in this extract — what continuation behavior does it perform?
Precise numeric meanings of U8P_DEVON::schedule constants assigned in U8P_DEVON::schedule (bitmask/slot semantics) are inferred but not proven by the disassembly.
Some internal engine helpers (METHOD::func091C, METHOD::func15E7, METHOD::func133F) have inferred roles; their exact side effects (animation vs state change vs timing) are not certain.

main_function.name: U8P_DEVON::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description/bark shown when the player 'looks at' Devon. Chooses a terse identifying string based on Devon-specific flags indicating whether Devon's name or job should be shown.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the player 'U8P_DEVON::look' (examine) action on the Devon NPC.
No parameters; selects output using internal flags devonName and devonJob.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::look
function_map.role: short examine/description handler producing a context-aware bark ('Devon' / 'fisherman' / 'man')

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::use
function_map.role: primary dialogue/conversation process: menu construction, player-name insertion, choice capture, branching, and conversation-state flag updates

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::schedule
function_map.role: compute and set NPC U8P_DEVON::schedule/activity parameters based on time-of-day and special-state flags, then apply them via an engine method

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger that launches an immediate NPC activity (Npc::cSetActivity) unless blocked by global restart/kill guards

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit trigger used for cleanup: clear transient references (FREE::resetRef)

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: reaction handler for nearby theft: clear refs, call generic reaction helper, bark, and call Devon-specific follow-up

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::cast
function_map.role: react to specific U8P_DEVON::cast/selectors applied to Devon (param1): immobilize Avatar for certain selectors, clear combat, run timed reaction steps and possibly summon guards

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::func5079
function_map.role: utility to spawn positional visual/effect items, play SFX, animate frames and launch LightningBolt/process effects; used during U8P_DEVON::cast reactions

internal_calls.purpose: Continue Devon-specific theft-response sequence after the generic reaction and bark (follow-up behavior).
Spawn/compute positional visual/effect and apply an Item::receiveHit-style effect as part of the U8P_DEVON::cast reaction.

external_calls.purpose: Query current time-of-day period to select appropriate U8P_DEVON::schedule/activity constants.
Apply/finalize the computed U8P_DEVON::schedule/activity parameters to the NPC (engine method).
Launch a process to set/start the NPC's immediate activity when the Avatar enters the fast-area.
Clear a transient fast-area reference (cleanup on area exit).
Short-circuit theft handling on a specific map id (map 0x03).
Clear multiple transient refs (0x0205, 0x0204, 0x0200) as part of theft reaction.
Run a generic reaction/animation or conversation helper immediately after refs are cleared.
Place the Avatar in stasis (immobilize) when handling certain U8P_DEVON::cast selectors (param1 == 1).
Clear Devon's in-combat flag as part of the reaction sequence.
Trigger a generic reaction/timing/animation helper at the start of the U8P_DEVON::cast reaction sequence.
Pacing/timing helper used repeatedly between suspend calls during the U8P_DEVON::cast reaction animations.
Notify/trigger guards when Devon is assaulted and not in a protected 'inRule' state.
Generic reaction/conversation housekeeping helper invoked at certain dialogue branches.
Spawn helper processes used as part of the visual/effect sequence.
Launch a LightningBolt effect/process as part of the spawned visual/effect sequence.
Create temporary visual effect items, position and animate them, apply an Item::receiveHit effect (damage/impact), then destroy them.
Read current HP and facing direction to supply Item::receiveHit with context for the applied hit/effect.
Play a sound effect to accompany the spawned visual/effect items.

reads.name: devonName
reads.likely_effect: Selects whether Devon's personal name should be used in short barks/descriptions.

reads.name: devonJob
reads.likely_effect: Selects whether Devon's job ('fisherman') should be used in short barks/descriptions.

reads.name: devonJailed
reads.likely_effect: Alters U8P_DEVON::schedule/activity selection and dialogue options when Devon is jailed.

reads.name: devonInRule
reads.likely_effect: Selects special 'in-rule' behavior/U8P_DEVON::schedule and modifies whether guards are notified in reactions.

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Acts as a global blocker to prevent U8P_DEVON::schedule/activity startup on fast-area entry.

reads.name: secondexecution
reads.likely_effect: Acts as a global restart/second-execution guard that may prevent certain start-up behaviors.

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: Read during dialogue to influence initial greeting or early branching (player state-dependent).

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Influences specific dialogue branches referencing other plot state.

reads.name: devonMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to select personalized greetings vs first-time lines in conversation.

reads.name: needTear
reads.likely_effect: Gates inclusion of quest-related menu options (Blackrock fragment/tear).

reads.name: devonMentionedTear
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating the same quest topic in conversation (dialogue gating).

reads.name: refusedDevon
reads.likely_effect: Alters menu text/branches when the player previously refused to help Devon.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Affects dialogue branches referencing the Lurker/hydros freedom.

reads.name: devonHeardLurker
reads.likely_effect: Used to gate Lurker-related dialogue options.

writes.name: various Devon/plot flags (dialogue-driven)
writes.likely_effect: Set in U8P_DEVON::use to record conversation outcomes and progress quest/NPC state (24 SetFlag nodes found); exact flag names are not fully enumerated in extract.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Devon's interactions and behaviors: a short 'U8P_DEVON::look' description, a large branching conversation ('U8P_DEVON::use'), behavior scheduling, fast-area entry/exit handling, reactions to theft, and reactions to being targeted by spells/effects.
